summary: Created skill-pr-review-implementation and pr-review-implementation-agent for the CSLib extension. The skill dispatches between review-response workflow (sources present) and legacy PR description workflow (sources absent), and transitions tasks to [PR READY] using preflight pr_ready. Updated manifest.json to register the new skill and agent, and changed routing.implement.pr from skill-pr-implementation to skill-pr-review-implementation.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for task 724: skill-pr-review-implementation and pr-review-implementation-agent creation
